sentences.chineseTranslation: 瑪瑟妮亞．萊爾非常熱愛棒球。

vocabularyNotes.title: love
vocabularyNotes.explanation: 動詞，表示『熱愛、深深喜愛』，語氣比 like 更強。

sentences.englishOriginal: She loved the powdery taste of dust clouds as she slid through them.
sentences.chineseTranslation: 她喜歡滑壘時揚起塵土，那種帶著沙土氣息的味道。

vocabularyNotes.title: powdery
vocabularyNotes.explanation: 形容粉末狀、佈滿細粉的質感。
examples: The road became powdery after days without rain.

vocabularyNotes.title: dust cloud
examples: A dust cloud rose behind the truck.

phraseNotes.title: slide through
examples: The player slid through the dirt.

grammarNotes.title: as + clause
examples: She smiled as she walked home.
